content.speakerText: You seem super passionate about photography—what’s your favorite shot ever?
content.speakerTextCn: 你好像超爱摄影，拍过最满意的一张是哪张？

options.text: I’m not really into it, to be honest.
It’s a photo I took at dawn in Kyoto—everything was quiet, just mist and temples.
I don’t have a camera, so I can’t answer that.
Why do you care about my photos?

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了对方的提问，用具体细节自然流露热情，符合‘表达兴趣不显刻意’的场景目标。选项1和3回避话题，显得冷淡；选项4语气生硬，不符合社交中的自然表达。

content.speakerText: I noticed you’ve been reading a lot of sci-fi lately. What’s the last book that really blew you away?
content.speakerTextCn: 我注意到你最近读了很多科幻小说，哪一本让你印象最深刻？

options.text: It was ‘Project Hail Mary’—the science was so creative, and the main character was so relatable.
Can you lend me your books?
I only read textbooks for work.

content.explanation: 正确答案用具体细节（书名、科学创意、角色共鸣）自然表达兴趣，符合场景要求。选项1和4否定兴趣，破坏对话氛围；选项3虽积极但未回应问题，属于跑题回应。

content.speakerText: You always look so calm when you’re sketching. Do you have a favorite subject to draw?
content.speakerTextCn: 你画画时总是看起来特别平静，有特别喜欢画的主题吗？

options.text: I just doodle to kill time.
I love drawing cityscapes at night—the lights and shadows create such a mood.
Can you teach me how to draw?

content.explanation: 正确答案用生动的描述（城市夜景、光影氛围）自然展现兴趣，符合‘流露好感’的语境。选项1贬低行为，选项3跳过问题直接邀约，选项4含糊不清，都缺乏情感投入。
